summary: Enhance workflow plan output to describe step dependencies and completion conditions for multi-step issues. The workflow plan artifact already supports dependency representation via edges (from/to), but the planner output (plan comment) doesn't surface dependencies, and blocked reasons don't explain which dependency is blocking. Changes: (1) Update render_plan_comment in controller.ex to show dependency relationships between derived nodes. (2) Update the blocked error message in orchestrator.ex to include specific incomplete dependencies. (3) Add tests in workflow_artifacts_test.exs covering dependency-bearing and dependency-free plan validation. (4) Fixed valid_node? in artifacts.ex to properly validate completion_conditions when present.
acceptance_criteria: The workflow plan artifact can represent dependencies between planned steps.
Runner or monitoring output can explain which dependency blocked a later step.
Add schema or parser tests that cover dependency-bearing and dependency-free plans.
completed_items: Updated render_plan_comment in controller.ex to show dependency relationships and completion conditions
Updated describe_blocking_dependencies in orchestrator.ex to include specific incomplete dependencies
Fixed valid_node? in artifacts.ex to properly validate completion_conditions
Added tests for completion_conditions validation in workflow_artifacts_test.exs
Added test for dependency relationships in plan comment in workflow_controller_test.exs
All related tests pass (61 tests, 0 failures)
